# What this PR does

Brief description of the change.

# Why

What problem does it solve, or what feature does it enable?

# How to test

Steps a reviewer can follow to verify the change works as expected.

# Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the existing style
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`python -m pytest tests/` if tests exist)
- [ ] I have tested on at least one platform (macOS / Windows / Linux)
- [ ] README or docs updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] Commit messages are clear and follow the existing repo style
